name: Action HD Ticket - Development Process Owner
description:
Here is to inform you that the following {{ doctype }}({{ name }}) requires your attention/action.
The details of the request are as follows:
Label Value
Subject {{subject}}
Process {{custom_process}}
assign_condition: status in ("Closed", "Resolved") and ticket_type == 'Bug' and not development_process_owner_remark
unassign_condition: status in ("Closed", "Resolved") and ticket_type == 'Bug' and development_process_owner_remark
